title: Add reusable issue key formatter (global vs project context)
description:
Add shared helper in Python and Rust to format issue identifiers:
- global context shows KEY-<git-style abbreviated hash> with key uppercased
- project context hides key and shows abbreviated hash only
- numeric IDs pass through unchanged
- hash abbreviation uses git default length (7 chars) stripping hyphens
Cover with BDD for both implementations.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Planning: add dual ID generation modes. Default: generate full UUID-based ID (stored), display abbreviated. Beads compatibility mode: generate Beads-style child IDs when writing JSONL. Update formatter to pass through existing IDs. Add Gherkin scenarios for UUID IDs vs Beads IDs + mode switch. Next: inspect issue_creation + ids + beads mode flow.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented UUID-based ID generation for native Taskulus; added Beads JSONL write path for --beads create (parent-child uses parent.id.N, top-level uses 3-char slug). Added beads create scenario, new beads write modules, and updated ID parsing in tests to handle abbreviated display.
